linting.notes: ESLint runs for all TypeScript/JavaScript workspaces with comprehensive rules including React hooks, import ordering, and prettier. Go linting uses golangci-lint v2.0.2 with standard presets.

testing.mock_patterns: Jest mocks in __mocks__ directories, transform helpers for CSS/assets
testing.notes: Tests include: mod-arch-core (63 tests), mod-arch-shared (26 tests), mod-arch-kubeflow (no tests), mod-arch-installer (flavor template tests). Go tests use envtest but work without it. Test framework is ts-jest with jsdom environment.

gating_checks.name: Test individual packages
gating_checks.command: npm run test:core && npm run test:shared && npm run test:kubeflow

ci.notes: CI runs on Node.js 22.x. All jobs are gating for pull requests. Pre-commit hook runs lint-staged on changed files.

build.notes: Monorepo with 4 workspaces: mod-arch-core, mod-arch-shared, mod-arch-kubeflow, mod-arch-installer. Build uses TypeScript compiler (tsc) + tsc-alias for path resolution. Requires rsync system dependency for copying assets.

conventions.import_style: Absolute imports with ~ alias for src root, enforced by eslint-plugin-no-relative-import-paths
conventions.notes: Strict ESLint rules including no console.log, naming conventions (camelCase/PascalCase), import ordering. Uses Prettier for code formatting. Semantic commit messages required (conventional-changelog).

setup_commands: apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq rsync make git

lint_commands.notes: SUCCESS - exit 0, no lint violations found

test_commands.notes: SUCCESS - exit 0, 11 test suites, 89 tests passed (mod-arch-core: 63, mod-arch-shared: 26, mod-arch-installer: flavor tests)

container_recipe.notes: Build must complete before tests. Requires --ignore-scripts for npm ci to avoid build failures during install. Go tests validated separately and pass (mod-arch-starter/bff). Go lint finds 5 unused code violations but command works.
